title: WE Learn B1U4 Movies 翻译练习

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】孙悟空是我最喜欢的动画人物。
options: Monkey King is my favorite cartoon character.
I am fond of Monkey King much better than any other cartoon characters.
questions.correct_answer: A. Monkey King is my favorite cartoon character.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】李小龙的电影打破了西方对中国人的刻板印象。
options: Bruce Lee's films have broken out the Western old impression of Chinese people.
Bruce Lee's films have smashed the Western stereotype of Chinese people.
questions.correct_answer: B. Bruce Lee's films have smashed the Western stereotype of Chinese people.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】现在中国电影在欧美国家很受欢迎。
options: Now Chinese films have popularity very much in Europe and America.
Chinese movies are very popular in Europe and America now.
questions.correct_answer: B. Chinese movies are very popular in Europe and America now.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】从十四世纪开始，中国传统皮影戏传播到波斯、阿拉伯、土耳其、泰国、日本、英格兰、意大利等地。
options: From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play spread to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.
From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play was sent to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.
questions.correct_answer: B. From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play was sent to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】昆曲自明代中叶以来独领中国剧坛近300年。
options: Since the middle of the Ming Dynasty, Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world for nearly 300 years.
Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world since nearly 300 years in the mid-Ming Dynasty.
questions.correct_answer: A. Since the middle of the Ming Dynasty, Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world for nearly 300 years.

questions.title:
【B1U4 Movies · 英译中】

One night he heard some mice in the wastebasket. He caught them and kept them in small cages on his desk. One of these little mice became his particular friend and gave him the idea for the famous cartoon character Mickey Mouse, a clean mouse in a clean world. In 1928 Mickey Mouse first appeared in a cartoon film.
questions.correct_answer: 一天晚上他听到废纸篓里有老鼠的声音。他把老鼠抓来关在小笼子里，摆在了桌上。其中一只小老鼠成了他特殊的伙伴，给他带来了创作著名卡通形象米老鼠——一只生活在纯洁世界里的纯洁的小老鼠——的灵感。1928年，米老鼠首次在卡通电影中亮相。
